name: Userlike Customer Messaging Platform API
what_it_does: Customer messaging and live chat platform with REST API — providing website live chat, WhatsApp Business, Facebook Messenger, SMS, Telegram, and Threema integration in a unified agent inbox, with chatbot capabilities, GDPR-compliant data handling, and privacy-first architecture for European businesses.
use_cases: Managing customer conversations across live chat and WhatsApp via Userlike Unified Inbox
Integrating Userlike with CRM systems for customer data sync via REST API
Configuring chatbot flows and automated responses via Userlike bot API
Querying conversation analytics and agent performance for customer service reporting
Setting up WhatsApp Business messaging for proactive customer outreach
not_for: Large enterprise contact center (use Genesys or Salesforce Service for enterprise)
High-volume ticket management without messaging (use Zendesk for ticket-centric support)
Social media management beyond messaging (use Sprout Social for full social management)
best_when: A European business needs a GDPR-compliant messaging platform covering website chat and WhatsApp — with German hosting infrastructure and privacy-first design for regulated industries.
avoid_when: You primarily need telephone support, manage very high ticket volumes, or don't have European data residency requirements.

auth.notes: API token from Userlike account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for conversation events (new message, conversation closed, chatbot trigger). WhatsApp Business API via Userlike's WhatsApp Business Solution Provider (BSP) partnership. No fine-grained OAuth2 scopes. Threema Work integration for highest-security messaging.

pricing.notes: German company (Cologne). Founded 2012. Bootstrapped and profitable. 10,000+ customers across Europe. German hosting (AWS Frankfurt) for GDPR compliance. WhatsApp Business integration is key growth area. Threema Work integration for high-security sectors (healthcare, government, finance). Privacy Shield successor (SCCs) compliance for EU data. Used extensively in DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for conversations, contacts, agents, and analytics. API token bearer auth. Good documentation for European SMB market. WhatsApp Business requires Meta BSP registration via Userlike. Webhook for conversation events. Chatbot configured in Userlike dashboard. EU data residency (Frankfurt) guaranteed.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Conversation reads idempotent. Contact reads idempotent. Message sends not idempotent — use webhook events for delivery confirmation.
known_agent_gotchas: WhatsApp Business requires Meta BSP agreement — Userlike is certified BSP partner
Threema Work requires Threema Work licensing separately — not included in Userlike pricing
Free tier limited to 1 agent and website chat only — WhatsApp requires paid plan
ePrivacy Directive: cookie consent required before chat widget loads in EU
German company with EU data residency — data subject to Standard Contractual Clauses for US connections

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and ePrivacy compliant. EU data residency (Germany/AWS Frankfurt). API token auth. German company with GDPR-first design. AWS Frankfurt hosting ensures EU data stays in EU. ePrivacy consent for chat widget in EU. WhatsApp message content is end-to-end encrypted in transit but decrypted at BSP — Userlike processes WhatsApp content. Threema option for highest-security end-to-end encryption scenarios.
